payload.note: The alert 'gold-ofac-tareck-001' flags a discrepancy in individual onboarding data for Tareck El Aissami (known aliases: Tareck El Aissami Maddah). The screened party's date of birth is 1990-05-11 and they are associated with the US, contrasting with the matched party from the SDN list, who has a DOB of 1974-11-12, is linked to Venezuela (VE), and matches on country. The decision label is 'investigate_next_step' due to sparse or contradictory information necessitating analyst review before closure.
missing_information_summary: Additional corroboration needed for date of birth and geography
payload.next_step_rationale: Investigate contradiction regarding date of birth and geographical data to resolve mismatches before deciding on the next steps.
